ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bicycle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bicycle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the bicycle model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bicycle model */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the bicycle (e.g., mountain, road, hybrid) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the bicycle */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the bicycle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size option */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size option (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size option */,
  "frame_material" TEXT /* Material of the frame (e.g., aluminum, carbon fiber) */,
  "wheel_size" TEXT /* Wheel size (e.g., 26 inches, 29 inches) */,
  "seat_post_diameter" TEXT /* Diameter of the seat post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle model */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size option */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., bike stand-over height) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., millimeters, inches) */,
  "spec_type" TEXT /* Type of specification (e.g., geometry, performance) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the specification */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the specification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES bicycle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommended_sizes" (
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended bicycle model */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size option */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam of the customer */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "recommended_by" TEXT /* Who made the recommendation (e.g., system, expert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_sizes_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES bicycle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each bicycle model
Category of the bicycle (e.g., mountain, road, hybrid)
Price range of the bicycle model
Unique identifier for each size option
Name of the size option (e.g., small, medium, large)
Material of the frame (e.g., aluminum, carbon fiber)
Name of the specification (e.g., bike stand-over height)
Additional notes or comments about the specification
ID of the recommended bicycle model
ID of the recommended size option
Confidence level of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low)
Who made the recommendation (e.g., system, expert)
